description: Create an OpenSearch ISM (Index State Management) policy named 'wazuh-alert-retention' to manage the lifecycle of Wazuh alert indices at https://localhost:9200 (admin/SecretPassword). The policy must include a 'hot' state that transitions to 'warm' when the index age is 30 days, a 'warm' state that applies 'force_merge' (max_num_segments: 1) and 'read_only' actions before transitioning to 'delete' at 90 days, and a 'delete' state that removes the index. Configure an ISM template to apply this policy to indices matching 'wazuh-alerts-*' and ensure the policy is attached to all existing indices matching that pattern.
